transparency.title: Helping People Comes First
transparency.lead: XAYR exists to connect generous people with the individuals, families, and communities who need support. Our mission is to help people — while keeping the platform sustainable.
transparency.missionBody: Every donation goes directly to the campaign organizer. We put trust and transparency above everything else.
transparency.feeBody: Any platform commission is used only to operate and improve XAYR, including:
transparency.card1Text: Helping people in need across Uzbekistan.
transparency.card3Text: Campaigns are reviewed and verified before fundraising.
transparency.card4Text: Platform fees help maintain and improve XAYR.
transparency.feeWhyTitle: Why does XAYR charge a platform fee?
transparency.sustainability: This small fee helps keep XAYR secure, reliable, and sustainable — so we can help more people.

trust.title: Why Trust XAYR?
trust.subtitle: We believe every donation should be secure, transparent, and reach the people who need it.
s1Points: Every campaign is reviewed before fundraising begins.
Identity verification (KYC) is required to create a campaign.
Anyone can report a campaign for review.
s3Points: Campaign owners cannot withdraw money instantly.
Funds are transferred manually after verification.
trust.s4Intro: After fundraising ends, campaign owners are encouraged — and may be required by platform rules — to publish a Completion Report showing how the funds were used.
trust.s4Outro: This helps donors see the real impact of their generosity.
s6Points: Anonymous donations are supported when enabled.
Sensitive information is never displayed publicly.
trust.s7Intro: If something looks wrong, you can act:

transparencyPage.subtitle: Real, aggregated numbers from XAYR — we never expose private information.
transparencyPage.note: These figures are aggregated from real database records. Personal data, bank cards, donor identities, and individual withdrawal requests are never shown.

offer.title: Public Offer
offer.subtitle: The public offer governing the use of the XAYR crowdfunding platform.
offer.intro: This Public Offer sets out the terms on which XAYR provides its crowdfunding platform. By creating a campaign or making a donation, you accept these terms.

sections.heading: About XAYR
paragraphs: XAYR is a charitable crowdfunding platform that connects donors with verified campaign creators in Uzbekistan.
XAYR provides the technology and verification tools. It is not a party to the relationship between a donor and a campaign creator, and it does not collect donations for its own benefit.

sections.heading: Acceptance of this offer
paragraphs: By donating to a campaign, or by creating or managing a campaign, you confirm that you have read and agree to this Public Offer together with the Terms of Service, the Privacy Policy, the Refund Policy, and the Campaign Verification & Withdrawal Rules.

sections.heading: Voluntary donations
paragraphs: All donations on XAYR are voluntary and are directed to the campaign chosen by the donor.
A completed donation is generally non-refundable, except in the limited cases described in the Refund Policy.

sections.heading: Verification and outcomes
paragraphs: XAYR reviews every campaign and verifies the creator's identity before fundraising begins. Verification reduces risk but does not remove it.
bullets: XAYR verifies campaign creators through identity verification (KYC).
XAYR moderates campaigns before they are published.
XAYR cannot guarantee that a campaign will reach its goal or achieve its stated outcome.
Campaign creators are solely responsible for using the funds for the stated purpose.

sections.heading: Platform fees
paragraphs: If a platform fee applies, it is disclosed transparently. Donors pay no platform fee. A small platform commission may be deducted from a creator's withdrawal to operate and improve XAYR.
Exact fee details are published on the Fees page and may be updated over time.

sections.heading: Platform rules
paragraphs: Users must follow the platform rules, including the prohibited-content rules in the Terms of Service. XAYR may moderate or remove content, and suspend accounts, that violate these rules.

sections.heading: Contact
paragraphs: For questions about this Public Offer, contact us through the Contact page.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.subtitle: How and when donations can be refunded on XAYR.
refund.intro: This Refund Policy explains when a donation can be returned and when it cannot. Because donations fund real campaigns and are transferred to verified creators, refunds are limited.

sections.heading: Overview
paragraphs: Donations are voluntary and are intended to reach campaign creators. This policy describes the specific situations in which a refund may or may not be possible.

sections.heading: When refunds are possible
paragraphs: A refund may be issued in the following cases:
bullets: You were charged but the donation did not complete due to a technical or failed payment.
A duplicate or accidental charge occurred for the same donation.
A campaign was removed for fraud or a serious rules violation before the funds were transferred to the creator.
A refund is required by applicable law.

sections.heading: After funds are transferred to the campaign owner
paragraphs: Once donated funds have been reviewed, approved, and paid out to a campaign creator, XAYR can no longer reverse the transfer, and a refund cannot be issued through the platform.
At that point the funds are with the creator and are used for the campaign. If you believe funds are being misused, please report the campaign so XAYR can investigate.

sections.heading: Failed payments
paragraphs: If a payment fails or is not confirmed, the donation is not completed and no funds reach the campaign. Any temporary authorization hold is released by your payment provider.
If you were charged for a donation that shows as failed, contact support with the payment reference so we can help.

sections.heading: Duplicate payments
paragraphs: If you were charged more than once for the same donation, contact support with the transaction references. Verified duplicate charges are refunded.

sections.heading: How to request a refund and contact support
paragraphs: To request a refund, contact us through the Contact page and include your name, the campaign, the amount, the date, and the payment reference. We review eligible requests and respond as soon as possible.

verificationRules.title: Campaign Verification & Withdrawal Rules
verificationRules.subtitle: How XAYR verifies campaigns and reviews withdrawals to keep the platform trustworthy.
verificationRules.intro: These rules explain the checks XAYR applies at each stage: identity verification, campaign review, withdrawal review, completion reports, extension requests, and fraud investigations.

sections.heading: Identity verification (KYC)
paragraphs: Before creating a campaign, a creator must pass identity verification. This protects donors and keeps fundraising accountable.
bullets: The creator submits identity documents and a selfie.
An administrator reviews the submission.
Documents are stored securely and are never shown publicly.
Only verified creators can publish campaigns and request withdrawals.

sections.heading: Campaign review
paragraphs: Every new campaign is moderated before it goes live. A campaign starts as pending and becomes active only after review.
Administrators may approve a campaign or reject it with a reason. Misleading campaigns, or campaigns that violate the rules, are rejected.

sections.heading: Manual withdrawal review
paragraphs: Campaign creators cannot withdraw funds instantly. Each withdrawal request enters a manual review workflow.

A request moves from pending review to approved and then to paid. Funds are transferred after verification, and the transfer reference is recorded. A platform commission may be deducted at withdrawal.

sections.heading: Completion reports
paragraphs: After a campaign completes, the creator is expected to publish a completion report showing how the donated funds were used.
bullets: The report includes a fund-usage breakdown and may include photos, receipts, and updates.
Reports are moderated; only administrator-approved reports are shown publicly.
Donors are notified when a completion report is approved.

sections.heading: Extension requests
paragraphs: The owner of an expired campaign that did not reach its goal may request a new deadline with a reason. Requests are limited (a maximum number of extensions, each within a capped number of days) and are reviewed by an administrator.
A request does not by itself reactivate a campaign — only administrator approval does.

sections.heading: Fraud investigations
paragraphs: XAYR investigates reports of fraud or misuse. Any user can flag a campaign for review.
During an investigation, XAYR may pause a campaign, withhold withdrawals, or suspend accounts. Confirmed fraud leads to removal of the campaign and may be reported to the relevant authorities.

sections.heading: Questions
paragraphs: For questions about verification or withdrawals, contact us through the Contact page.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your personal data.
privacy.intro: Xayr ("we", "the platform") respects your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect when you use the platform and how we use it. By using the platform, you agree to this policy.

sections.heading: Data we collect
paragraphs: We collect the data necessary to provide our services:
bullets: Account data: name, email, phone number, and password.
Profile data: avatar, bio, and preferred language.
Campaign data: the text and images of campaigns you create.
Transaction data: donation amount, date, and payment method.
Technical data: IP address, browser type, and usage statistics.

sections.heading: How we use data
paragraphs: We use the collected data for the following purposes:
bullets: Creating your account and providing services.
Processing donations and payments.
Notifying you about campaign status and events.
Ensuring platform security and preventing fraud.
Improving our services and providing support.

sections.heading: Sharing data
paragraphs: We do not sell your personal data to third parties. Data may only be shared with payment systems, service partners, and government authorities where required by law.
When you create a campaign, its title, description, and images become publicly visible.

sections.heading: Payment data
paragraphs: Payments are processed by licensed payment providers (Click, Payme, Uzcard, Humo). We do not store your full card numbers; this data is securely processed by the payment providers.

sections.heading: Cookies and tracking technologies
paragraphs: We use cookies to maintain your session and analyze platform usage. More details are provided in our Cookie Policy.

sections.heading: Data security
paragraphs: We use encryption, access controls, and secure servers to protect your data. However, we cannot guarantee 100% security of data transmission over the internet.

sections.heading: Your rights
paragraphs: You have the following rights:
bullets: Access and correct your personal data.
Request deletion of your account and data.
Opt out of marketing communications.
Object to the processing of your data.

sections.heading: Contact us
paragraphs: If you have any questions about privacy, contact us at Uzxayr@gmail.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: The rules and conditions for using the Xayr platform.
terms.intro: These terms govern your use of the Xayr platform. By accessing or using the platform, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree with the terms, please do not use the platform.

sections.heading: Acceptance of terms
paragraphs: By using the platform, you confirm that you are at least 18 years old or have the consent of a legal guardian, and you agree to comply with these terms.

sections.heading: Account and security
paragraphs: You are responsible for keeping your account credentials confidential. You are responsible for all activity carried out through your account. Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access.

sections.heading: Campaigns and obligations
paragraphs: Campaign creators agree to:
bullets: Raise funds only for genuine and lawful purposes.
Provide accurate and truthful information about the campaign.
Use the funds raised for the stated purpose.
Complete identity verification where applicable.

sections.heading: Donations and payments
paragraphs: Donations are voluntary. Confirmed payments are non-refundable except as provided by law. We monitor how campaigns use funds but do not guarantee the outcome of any campaign.

sections.heading: Prohibited activities
paragraphs: The following are prohibited on the platform:
bullets: Creating fake or misleading campaigns.
Posting illegal, violent, or hateful content.
Violating other users' rights or committing fraud.
Attempting to compromise platform security.

sections.heading: Fees
paragraphs: Using the platform is free. Payment providers may charge their own transaction fees. Any platform fees are disclosed clearly in advance.

sections.heading: Limitation of liability
paragraphs: The platform is provided "as is". To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect damages arising from the use of the platform.

sections.heading: Changes and governing law
paragraphs: We may update these terms at any time. We will notify you of material changes. These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Uzbekistan.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: How and why we use cookies.
cookies.intro: This policy explains how the Xayr platform uses cookies and similar technologies. Cookies are small text files stored on your device.

sections.heading: What are cookies
paragraphs: Cookies help the website function efficiently, remember your preferences, and improve your experience.

sections.heading: Types of cookies we use
paragraphs: We use the following types of cookies:
bullets: Essential cookies: required for login and maintaining your session.
Preference cookies: remember your language and settings.
Analytics cookies: help us understand platform usage.

sections.heading: Third-party cookies
paragraphs: Payment providers and analytics services may set their own cookies. These cookies are governed by the privacy policies of the respective third parties.

sections.heading: Managing cookies
paragraphs: You can block or delete cookies through your browser settings. However, if essential cookies are disabled, some platform features may not work correctly.

sections.heading: Changes to this policy
paragraphs: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. The new version will be published on this page.

guidePage.title: How Xayr works
guidePage.subtitle: Five simple steps — from idea to impact.

steps.title: Create an account
steps.text: Sign up with your email and complete your profile.

steps.title: Verify your identity
steps.text: Upload your passport or ID card and a selfie — review usually takes 1-2 business days.

steps.title: Create a campaign
steps.text: Describe your goal, tell your story, add photos. Your campaign goes live after moderation.

steps.title: Receive donations
steps.text: Post updates as you go — transparency builds donor trust.

steps.title: Withdraw funds
steps.text: Request a withdrawal to your bank account or card. Every request is approved by an administrator.

guidePage.faqText: See answers to the most common questions.

faqPage.title: Frequently asked questions
faqPage.subtitle: The most important answers about Xayr.

items.a: On a campaign page press "Donate", choose an amount and a payment method.
Yes — tick "Anonymous" at checkout and your name will not be shown to anyone.
Confirmed payments are not refunded automatically. If something went wrong, contact us — each case is reviewed individually.
The minimum depends on the payment provider, usually from 1,000 so'm.

items.q: What do I need to start a campaign?
items.a: An account, identity verification (KYC), and your campaign details.

items.q: When will my campaign go live?
items.a: After moderator review — usually within 1-2 business days.
Yes — title, description and photos. Raised totals and status are changed only by administrators.

items.q: Can I work with a team?
items.a: Yes — the campaign owner can invite managers and editors by email.
For donor trust — only verified users can open campaigns.
Usually 1-2 business days after documents are submitted.
A passport or ID card (front, optionally back) and a selfie.
Send a "Withdraw funds" request on your campaign analytics page — once approved by an administrator, funds are transferred to your bank or card.
Requests are reviewed within 1-3 business days; a bank transfer may take another 1-2 days.
The reason is shown in your notification — usually incorrect account details or insufficient available balance.

items.q: Does the platform charge a commission?
items.a: Donating and creating campaigns are free. A 4% platform fee applies only when withdrawing funds.
Click, Payme and others may charge their own transaction fees — that is not a platform fee.
Yes — a 4% platform fee is deducted from the withdrawal amount. Bank transfer costs may apply separately.
Yes — payments run through licensed providers; we never store card details.

items.q: How do I report a suspicious campaign?
items.a: Use the "Report" button on the campaign page — moderators will review it.
Yes — data is transmitted over encrypted channels and stored with strict access control.

securityPage.title: Security
securityPage.subtitle: Xayr provides trust and protection at every step.

sections.title: Identity verification
sections.text: Every campaign author passes KYC with documents and a selfie. Unverified users cannot open campaigns.

sections.title: Campaign review
sections.text: Every campaign is reviewed by moderators and goes live only after approval.

sections.title: Donation security
sections.text: Payments run through licensed providers. Raised totals are protected — nobody can edit them manually.

sections.title: Data protection
sections.text: All data travels over encrypted channels. Access is strictly controlled — everyone sees only their own data.

sections.title: Fraud prevention
sections.text: Any user can report a suspicious campaign. Moderators review every report.

sections.title: Account protection
sections.text: Mandatory email verification, secure sessions and rate-limited login attempts.

feesPage.title: Fees
feesPage.subtitle: Full transparency — no hidden charges.

cards.title: Platform commission
cards.text: Using the platform is completely free — both creating campaigns and donating.

cards.title: Payment provider
cards.text: Click, Payme and other providers may charge their own transaction fees.

cards.title: Withdrawals
cards.text: A 4% platform fee is deducted only when funds are withdrawn — it covers hosting, security, verification, payment processing and platform development.

feesPage.exampleNote: The fee is charged only when withdrawing — donors pay nothing. The payment provider may withhold its own transaction fee per its tariff.
